HGSS.661.0001:
Well, now that we’ve made each other’s
acquaintance, shall we trade phone\r
numbers? [0200,0000]
HGSS.661.0002:
Lovely!
Now I shall be able to call you anytime.
HGSS.661.0003:
I see...\f
As to be expected, children prefer to
spend time with others their own age...
HGSS.661.0004:
You don’t really want to trade
phone numbers with me, do you? [0200,0000]
HGSS.661.0005:
What’s wrong? Aren’t we on the same
floor right now?\f
Why not talk in person?
HGSS.661.0006:
I was so surprised!
A few days ago, I received a NOCTOWL\r
when I traded with someone.\f
It turns out that NOCTOWL was the same
one I gave away in a trade with another\r
Trainer years ago!\f
I guess that’s a case of “What goes
around, comes around,” in that it came\r
back to me.\f
The world is small after all!
HGSS.661.0007:
It’s kind of disappointing.
A few days ago, I received a NOCTOWL\r
when I traded with someone.\f
It was such a familiar NOCTOWL...\f
I thought it was the NOCTOWL that I had
originally trained!\f
It’d somehow found its way back...
I was so moved...\r
But when I looked closer, I saw that\r
it wasn’t the NOCTOWL I thought it was.\f
That kind of thing can’t really happen
in this world, right?
HGSS.661.0008:
You know, whenever I try to catch a
wild Pokémon, they seem to always run\r
away. It’s happened so many times.\f
A couple days ago a RATTATA got away
from me...\f
You know, whenever I meet a person or
Pokémon, I always make sure to take off\r
my hat and introduce myself properly,\r
and that’s when they run away.\f
RATTATA are such impolite creatures...
HGSS.661.0009:
Ha ha, would you like to battle again?
I think that’s a fine idea!\f
I’ll meet you at [0104,0003,0000]!
HGSS.661.0010:
Is everything all right?
Did you forget about our appointment?\f
I’m waiting at [0104,0003,0000].
I will see you there!
HGSS.661.0011:
Just like this, when calling a young
person such as yourself, you can trade\r
information.\f
Just like this, Pokémon bring people
together, don’t they?\f
Truly, Pokémon are such
extraordinary creatures.
